title: code_tutor interactive codebase-learning CLI
objective: Ship a new python_pkg/code_tutor package that turns an unfamiliar codebase into an interactive lesson: analyse code into items, order them dependency-first, pose reimplement challenges, and verify user implementations with tests and coverage, with optional local-LLM hints.
acceptance_criteria: Analyzer extracts functions/classes as CodeItems from a codebase.
Plan builder orders items dependency-first and groups them into sessions.
Challenge flow discovers matching user tests and drives the attempt loop.
Verifier runs the user's implementation against tests and enforces a coverage bar.
Whole package passes ruff select=ALL, mypy strict, pylint 10/10, and 100% line+branch test coverage.
out_of_scope: Bundling or managing the local LLM runtime itself.
